summary: Four core tools: bash (rg-enforced), read, write, edit — all return ToolResult
detail: tools.py implements bash (blocks find/grep -r/ls -R/cat, enforces rg), read (line-numbered, offset/limit), write (creates parent dirs), edit (find/replace, must match exactly once). ToolResult(output, is_error). agent.py guarantees output is non-empty when is_error=True.
